name: Salad Dionne Warwick
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to a boil and salt it. Cook the ziti according to package directions, then drain and rinse under cold water. Drain again and set aside.
2. Add broccoli florets to the boiling water and cook for 2-3 minutes until just tender. Drain and refresh under cold running water. Drain again and spread out on paper towels to dry.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together mustard, salt, pepper, and vinegar. Slowly add oil, whisking until smooth. Stir in ziti, broccoli, and Parmesan cheese; do not toss.
4. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
5. Just before serving, gently toss the salad until well coated with the dressing. Core the tomatoes and cut into wedges for garnish.
